allow: PowerShell($url = "https://nodejs.org/dist/v24.18.0/node-v24.18.0-win-x64.zip"; $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\tools"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $dest | Out-Null; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile "$dest\\node.zip"; Expand-Archive "$dest\\node.zip" -DestinationPath $dest -Force; Rename-Item "$dest\\node-v24.18.0-win-x64" "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & "$dest\\node\\node.exe" --version)
